About: It is about hip hop music.
Affects: It affects the hip hop genre.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Mount Vernon, New York.
It is associated with Elektra Records.
It is associated with The Untouchables management.
It is associated with Heavy D & The Boyz.
It is associated with Native Tongues Crew.
It is associated with Untouchables Entertainment.
It is associated with Sprite TV commercial.
It is associated with London's famous Jazz Cafe.
It is associated with Gang Starr.
It is associated with Guru.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the American hip hop genre.
CausedBy: It is caused by creative differences.
It is caused by resurfacing tensions between members.
ConsistsOf: It consists of two members, Pete Rock and CL Smooth.
CreatedBy: It was created by Peter Phillips and Corey Penn.
CreatedIn: It was created in Mount Vernon High School.
HasA: It has a signature hit called "They Reminisce Over You (T.R.O.Y.)".
It has a debut EP titled All Souled Out.
It has a debut album titled Mecca and the Soul Brother.
It has a follow-up album titled The Main Ingredient.
It has a best-of compilation titled Good Life.
It has a deluxe CD box set of Mecca and the Soul Brother.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by Pete Rock's use of obscure soul and jazz records.
It is characterized by horn-driven hooks.
It is characterized by CL Smooth's conscious style of rap.
It is characterized by avoidance of profanity.
It is characterized by a style and delivery similar to positive East Coast rappers.
It is characterized by collaborations on remixes, soundtracks, and other works.
It is characterized by intermittent collaborations after a breakup.
HeldIn: It was held in London at the Jazz Cafe.
Influenced: It influenced the hip hop genre.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the death of hip-hop pioneer Guru.
It was influenced by the fate of Gang Starr.
IsA: It is an American hip hop duo.
KnownFor: It is known for its debut EP All Souled Out.
It is known for its 1992 LP Mecca and the Soul Brother.
It is known for its signature hit "They Reminisce Over You (T.R.O.Y.)".
It is known for Pete Rock's production style.
It is known for CL Smooth's conscious rap style.
It is known for collaborations with other artists.
It is known for producing Run–D.M.C.'s single "Down with the King".
LocatedIn: It is located in Mount Vernon, New York.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Golden Age of hip hop.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Mount Vernon, New York.
It occurred in the 1990s.
It occurred in 1991.
It occurred in 1992.
It occurred in 1993.
It occurred in 1994.
It occurred in 1995.
It occurred in 1998.
It occurred in 2001.
It occurred in 2003.
OriginatedIn: It originated in Mount Vernon, New York.
PartOf: It is part of the history of hip hop music.
PerformedBy: It was performed by CL Smooth.
It was performed by Pete Rock.
ProducedBy: It was produced by DJ Pete Rock.
It was produced by Eddie F.
It was produced by Nevelle Hodge.
PublishedAs: It was published as an EP titled All Souled Out.
It was published as an LP titled Mecca and the Soul Brother.
It was published as an album titled The Main Ingredient.
It was published as a compilation titled Good Life.
It was published as a deluxe CD box set of Mecca and the Soul Brother.
It was published as a soundtrack for Who's the Man?: Original Motion Picture Soundtrack.
It was published as a soundtrack for Menace II Society: The Original Motion Picture Soundtrack.
It was published as a soundtrack for Poetic Justice: Music from the Motion Picture.
PublishedBy: It was published by Elektra Records.
It was published by Traffic Entertainment Group.
PublishedIn: It was published in 1991.
It was published in 1992.
It was published in 1993.
It was published in 1994.
It was published in 1998.
It was published in 2001.
It was published in 2003.
It was published in 2004.
It was published in 2006.
It was published in 2007.
UsedIn: It is used in hip hop music.
It is used in other works.
UsedTo: It is used to produce tracks for numerous artists.
